subject: docs: update tutorial, user guide, and testing guide for recent changes
body:
TutorialModal.jsx:
- Structure step: replaced "Text position" with "Reorder", added tip
  pointing to Content tab for alignment
- Content step: updated Structured mode to say "each cell has its own
  text elements" instead of "pick which cell"
- Export step: updated to 28 formats, added format selection + PDF

USER_GUIDE.md:
- Structure tab: removed Text Alignment subsection (moved to Content),
  added section reorder and insert before/after
- Content tab: added per-cell text model, removed cell dropdown,
  added Cell Alignment subsection
- PDF export: updated description

TESTING_GUIDE.md:
- L3: replaced section alignment test with section reorder test
- L4: replaced cell alignment test with Content tab alignment test
- L5: replaced global alignment test with insert section test
- C3: replaced cell dropdown test with per-cell text test
- Added E4 (format selection), E5 (PDF export), E6 (save/load)
- Regression checklist: added per-cell text, reorder, format, PDF,
  save/load checks; removed Structure tab alignment reference

Tags: docs, tutorial, testing
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch

title: update tutorial, user guide, and testing guide for recent changes
